purpose: Pre-baked typography pairs distributed over the (type_drama, formality) ∈ [0,1]² plane. Sprint 17 Task 33.2. The blend resolver projects an 8D vector's two type-relevant axes onto this plane and picks the nearest pair (Euclidean distance). When confidence is low (best-distance > 0.35 in the plane), the resolver snaps to the universally-safe fallback (humanistic-warm / Manrope) per sprint-doc Task 33.2 step 2. Display + body + mono fonts are coordinated within each pair so `pickPair` can return a complete, immediately-usable typography spec to stage 3.

pairs.notes: Universally-safe fallback. Innocent archetype — Manrope is rounded enough to feel friendly but neutral enough not to overpower.
Native OS stack. Lowest-drama, highest-formality corner — fintech / saas dashboards / govtech.
Inter is the canonical geometric-modernist sans. Pairs with itself for clarity in dashboards / b2b.
Helvetica Neue at 300/400/700 — the swiss-rationalism canonical pair. System-only, no web font load.
High-drama editorial serif over a calmer body serif. Sage / Ruler archetypes — newspaper / fashion / luxury.
Ruler archetype. DM Serif Display is the most dramatic flare for luxury / fintech-trust / corpcore.
Creator archetype. Variable-axis Bricolage gives high type drama without sliding into clown territory.
Jester archetype. Pairs with itself for unified expressive voice — used in zine-diy / chaos-packaging / playful brands.
Hero / Outlaw archetype. Syne ExtraBold reads as anti-authority but disciplined — neon-signage / brutalist / sports.
Explorer archetype. Variable-opsz Fraunces above a humanistic body — editorial-serif-revival / cottagecore-tech / wellness.
Lover archetype. High-contrast romantic serif, light tracking. Lato keeps body legible on long content.
Magician archetype. Space Grotesk's narrow waist + Inter body — developer-tools / web3 / sci-fi-hud.
